name: Chrysos Corporation Limited
analysis: C79 has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 36% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$6.5100, stop A$5.7915, target A$7.3600 (1.18:1) — then trail it.
